EAT FOLATE-RICH FOODS 23 POINTS TO PONDER EAT IRON-RICH FOODS /c63Iron is needed for hemoglobin synthesis, mental function and to provide immunity against diseases. /c63Deficiency of iron leads to anemia. /c63Iron deficiency is common particularly in women of reproductive age and children. /c63Iron deficiency during pregnancy increases maternal mortality and low birth weight infants. /c63In children, it increases susceptibility to infection and impairs learning ability. /c63Plant foods like green leafy vegetables, legumes and dry fruits contain iron. /c63Iron is also obtained through meat,
